description:
Generate branded event pages with custom domain/subdomain support and live gallery updates during the event. Include editable sections for event details, sponsors, and calls to action.

**Rationale:** Studios often need a polished public experience beyond internal operator tools. Microsites improve brand presence and create a stronger shareable destination.
title: White-Label Event Microsites
